expectations.text: Identifies 'lazy load Provider' as the wrong approach
expectations.evidence: Line 5: '동료의 제안(next/dynamic lazy load)은 잘못된 방향입니다'. Section 2 explicitly titled '동료의 제안이 틀린 이유'.

expectations.text: Explains 'use client' as a module-graph boundary
expectations.evidence: Line 32 direct official quote: 'boundary between the Server and Client module graphs... all its imports and child components are considered part of the client bundle' with nextjs.org URL.
Line 84: official quote 'ThemeProvider가 <html> 전체가 아니라 {children}만 감싸도록'. Step 1+2 implementation example shows ThemeProvider extracted to separate client component file.

expectations.text: Mentions concrete performance benefits (JS bundle / FCP / streaming)
expectations.evidence: Line 38-43 table lists: 'JS 번들 크기 폭증', 'FCP 지연', 'LCP 지연', 'Streaming 무력화'.
